how_to_take: Take one tablet daily, ideally after a meal for better absorption.
overdose_warning: Do not exceed 1000mg to 1500mg daily without medical supervision to avoid hypercalcemia.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

how_to_take: Take one tablet every 4-6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 4 tablets in 24 hours.
common_side_effects: None when taken at recommended doses
serious_side_effects: Liver damage (in case of severe overdose)
overdose_warning: Do not exceed 4000mg (4g) per day. Seek immediate emergency help if overdose is suspected.
storage: Store at room temperature below 30°C.

how_to_take: Take one tablet every 4-6 hours as needed for fever or pain.
overdose_warning: Max dose should not exceed 4000mg daily. Dolo 650 is a higher dose than standard Crocin.
storage: Protect from moisture and heat.

how_to_take: Take one tablet 30 minutes before your first meal (empty stomach).
overdose_warning: Using for extended periods without oversight can deplete essential minerals.
storage: Store in a dry place.
Room temperature.

how_to_take: Take 1 tablet every 4–6 hours as needed for pain or fever. Maximum 4 tablets (4000 mg) in 24 hours. Do not exceed recommended dose.
serious_side_effects: Seek urgent care if breathing difficulties
safe_for_pregnant: Generally safe; consult doctor before use
overdose_warning: Do not exceed 4000 mg (4g) per 24 hours. Overdose can cause severe liver damage. Seek immediate emergency care if overdose suspected.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from moisture and light. Keep out of reach of children.
clinical_note: Paracetamol is widely used for pain and fever relief. Always verify with pharmacist before use, especially if on other medications or have liver disease.
precautions: Do not exceed total daily dose of 4000mg
Avoid alcohol consumption while taking this medicine
Use caution if you have liver disease or hepatic impairment
Inform doctor if allergic to paracetamol
Not suitable as a substitute for prescription pain relief

counterfeiting_indicators.missing_security_features: No hologram, no QR scanner badge, no authenticity code
counterfeiting_indicators.missing_dates: Manufacture and expiration dates not clearly visible
counterfeiting_indicators.visual_quality: Heavy pixelation, inconsistent text rendering, artificial pill color
counterfeiting_indicators.packaging_issues: Red warning box duplicated/misaligned, blister pack lacks tamper-evident design

how_to_take: Take as directed by physician - do NOT take this counterfeit version
overdose_warning: Overdose can cause severe hypotension, syncope, and cardiovascular complications. Seek emergency care immediately.
storage: Store in cool, dry place below 30C. Keep away from moisture.
safety_note: THIS IS A COUNTERFEIT MEDICINE USED FOR TESTING. DO NOT CONSUME.
